name: Tagliatelle with Prosciutto and Radicchio
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta until al dente in a large pot. Drain well.
2. Toss with butter-flavored canola oil.
3. In a large skillet or wok, fry prosciutto or bacon until crisp.
4. Add a little olive oil if needed to prevent sticking.
5. Option #1: Combine herbs, radicchio, cheese, pepper, and meat in serving bowls. Toss with hot pasta. Serve in heated bowls and top with cheese shavings.
6. Option #2: Push meat aside and stir fry radicchio and herbs for about 3 minutes until just wilted and the color deepens to maroon. Add pasta. Toss with salt and pepper. Transfer to a heated serving bowl and top with cheese.
Variations:
- Any long, slender pasta
- Harlequin pasta: equal parts plain, beet, and spinach
- Equal amounts of linguine and angel hair
- Shorten pasta by breaking length in half
- Equal amounts of fresh basil or lemon basil and tarragon
- Good quality turkey bacon instead of prosciutto; cut into square pieces before frying.
